title: hebe × carsei
intro: Hebe × carsei, also known as the Alpine Hebe or Hebe carsei, is a hybrid of the Hebe genus, specifically a cross between Hebe salicornioides and Hebe odora. This evergreen shrub is native to New Zealand and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also known to have health benefits, including its potential to reduce stress and anxiety due to its adaptogenic properties, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Hebe × carsei can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
